## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what you want and why. -->

## Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?
     Remember: the project is a reference pattern. Additions should
     serve the goal of demonstrating controllable, auditable agent design —
     not general-purpose automation. -->

## Proposed approach

<!-- Optional: how you would implement it.
     If you have a concrete design in mind, sketch it here. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you think about? Why did you rule it out? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The feature fits the project's "small and excellent" philosophy
- [ ] It can be tested without Ollama (using `ScriptedBackend`)
- [ ] It does not require new dependencies that aren't already in `pyproject.toml`
